title: What's new for AI on GKE: Training, serving, and agents
summary: Google Kubernetes Engine has added innovations for AI training, serving, and agentic workflows. The platform now supports reinforcement learning and complex AI workloads with improved reliability, scalability, and cost-effectiveness.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video surveys recent additions to Google Kubernetes Engine for AI training, serving, and agentic workflows. The platform now supports reinforcement learning and other complex AI workloads, with stated gains in reliability, scalability, and cost-effectiveness. It matters because it positions GKE as a substrate for the full lifecycle of model work rather than serving alone. The discussion also touches on model compression and the operation of agentic workflows on Kubernetes.
